metadata.description: Sidekick — AI coding agents as Claude sidekicks. Forge (ForgeCode) is the first: auto-installs, configures via OpenRouter, and lets Claude delegate all coding work.

plugins.name: sidekick
plugins.description: Sidekick — a collection of AI coding agents as Claude sidekicks. Starting with Forge (ForgeCode): auto-installs, configures with OpenRouter (Qwen3 Coder Plus), and turns Claude into an orchestrator that delegates all coding, file-system, and git tasks while handling planning and user interaction itself.
